entry.title: 输出二维向量vector<vector<T>>的技巧
entry.content:
刷题时遇到的，可能没有什么卵用的小技巧...


vector<vector<int>> s;
while(!s.empty()){
        for (auto it = s.front().begin();it != s.front().end();it ++) {
            cout<<*it<< " ";
        }
        s.erase(s.begin());  //删除输出过的行
        cout<<endl;
    }

entry.title: DFS入门题记录
entry.content:
Codeup 5972


#include <iostream>
using namespace std;
bool visit[15];
int num[15];
int n;
void show(){
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) {
        cout<<num[i]<<" ";
    }
    cout<<endl;
}
void dfs(int step){
    if (step >  n){
        show();
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) {
        if (visit[i] == 0){
            num[step] = i;
            visit[i] = 1;
            dfs(step + 1);
            visit[i] = 0;
        }
    }
}
int main(){
    cin>>n;
    dfs(1);
    return 0;
}

Codeup 5973


#include <iostream>
using namespace std;
bool vis[30] = {0};
int num[30];
int n,r;
void dfs(int step){
    if (step == r + 1){
        for (int i = 1; i <= r; ++i) {
            cout<<num[i]<<" ";
        }
        cout<<endl;
        //return;
    }
    for (int j = num[step - 1]; j <= n; ++j) {
        if (vis[j] == 0){
            vis[j] = 1;
            num[step] = j;
            dfs(step + 1);
            vis[j] = 0;
        }
    }
    return;
}
int main(){
    cin>>n>>r;
    num[0] = 1;
    dfs(1);
    return 0;
}

洛谷P1219


#include <iostream>
using namespace std;
int col[100] = {0},d1[100] = {0},d2[100] = {0};
int vis[100] = {0};
int n;
int cnt = 0;
int ans = 0;
//d1左下到右上(i+j),d2左上到右下(i-j+n)
//i为行,j为列
void print(){
    if(ans < 3){
        for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) {
            cout<<vis[i]<<" ";
        }
        cout<<endl;
    }

    cnt++;
    //return;
}
void dfs(int step){
    if (step > n){
        print();
        ans ++;
        return;
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) {
        if (col[i] == 0 && d1[step + i] == 0 && d2[step - i + n] == 0){
            vis[step] = i;
            col[i] = 1;
            d1[step + i] = 1;
            d2[step - i + n] = 1;
            //cnt++;
            dfs(step + 1);
            //cnt--;
            col[i] = 0;
            d1[step + i] = 0;
            d2[step - i + n] = 0;
        }
    }
}
int main(){
    cin>>n;
    dfs(1);
    cout<<cnt;
    return 0;
}

###Codeup5976


#include <iostream>
using namespace std;
int col[100] = {0},d1[100] = {0},d2[100] = {0};
//d1左下到右上(i+j),d2左上到右下(i-j+n)
//i为行,j为列
int vis[100] = {0};
int n;
bool flag = 0; //标记是否有解
void print(){
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) {
        cout<<vis[i]<<" ";
    }
    flag = 1;
    cout<<endl;
}
void dfs(int step){
    if (step > n){
        print();

        return;
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) {
        if (col[i] == 0 && d1[step + i] == 0 && d2[step - i + n] == 0){
            vis[step] = i;
            col[i] = 1;
            d1[step + i] = 1;
            d2[step - i + n] = 1;
            dfs(step + 1);
            col[i] = 0;
            d1[step + i] = 0;
            d2[step - i + n] = 0;
        }
    }
}
int main(){
    cin>>n;
    dfs(1);
    if(flag == 0) printf("no solute!");//无解
    return 0;
}

entry.title: Leetcode26. 删除排序数组中的重复项
entry.content:
class Solution {
public:
    int removeDuplicates(vector<int>& nums) {
        set<int> a;
        for (auto it = nums.begin();it != nums.end();it++) {
            a.insert(*it);
        }
        nums.clear();
        for (auto it = a.begin();it != a.end();it++) {
            nums.push_back(*it);
        }
        return nums.size();
    }
};

entry.title: JavaWeb电商实现商品查询功能
entry.content:
• 效果图

  • 前端Jsp页面

        <!-- Search Area Start -->
                 <ul class="ht-dropdown search-box-view">
                        <li>
                        <form action="servlet/SearchServlet" class="position-relative">
                            <input class="email" placeholder="Search our catalog" name="cond" type="text">
                            <button type="submit" class="submit"><i class="icon-search" aria-hidden="true"></i></button>
                        </form>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
        <!-- Search Area End -->
  • Servlet层
protected void doPost(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response) throws ServletException, IOException {
        request.setCharacterEncoding("utf-8");
        String condition = request.getParameter("cond");
        String path = "/jsp/searchResult.jsp";
        try {
            GoodsDao dao = DAOFactory.getGoodsServiceInstance();
            List<Goods> daolist =  dao.searchGoods(condition);
            request.getSession().setAttribute("cond",condition);
        }catch (Exception e){
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        String truePath = request.getContextPath() + "/" + path;
        response.sendRedirect(truePath);
    }
  • DAO层
@Override
    public List<Goods> searchGoods(String cond) throws Exception{
        //模糊查询的精髓:使用占位符 % xx %
        String newcond = "%" + cond + "%";
        String sql = "select * from goods where gname like ?";
        Statement st = null;
        ResultSet rs = null;
        pstmt = this.conn.prepareStatement(sql);
        pstmt.setString(1,newcond);
        rs = pstmt.executeQuery();
        //将查询得到的全部商品信息存放在List<Goods>中
        List<Goods> goodsList = new ArrayList<Goods>();
        Goods goods;
        while (rs.next()) {
            System.out.println("serlvet deplyed!");
            int gid = rs.getInt("gid");
            String gname = rs.getString("gname");
            int number = rs.getInt("number");
            String photo = rs.getString("gphoto");
            String type = rs.getString("type");
            String producer = rs.getString("producer");
            float price = rs.getFloat("price");
            float carriage = rs.getFloat("carriage");
            String pdate = rs.getDate("pdate").toString();
            String paddress = rs.getString("paddress");
            String described = rs.getString("described");
            goods = new Goods(gname, number, photo, type, producer, price,
                    carriage, pdate, paddress, described);
            goods.setGid(gid);
            goodsList.add(goods);
            System.out.println(goods.getGname());
        }
        return goodsList;
    }

entry.title: JavaScript弹窗文字乱码问题的解决方法
entry.content:
输入错误的验证码后，应弹出“验证码错误!”的alert窗口，但是出现乱码

解决方法：在Servlet层中加上一句response.setContentType("text/html");设置页面的编码

重新运行，结果如图

entry.title: Java中"java.lang.NullPointerException"报错的解决方法
entry.content:
昨天在Java小学期编写一道类似C++“结构体排序”的题时出现了这样的错误

程序代码如下

显示第13行NullPointerException空指针异常
经查发现是只在第9行对结构体数组分配了内存空间，而没有对每个nums[i]进行实例化而产生错误。
添加nums[i] = new Student();后编译通过

entry.title: 题解Codeup6114:Course List for Student(字符串Hash+vector)
entry.content:
问题：

http://codeup.cn/problem.php?cid=100000596&pid=0

思路：

这道题相当于Codeup6117(http://codeup.cn/problem.php?cid=100000596&pid=1)的流程反过来，所以一开始打算用Hash+vector存，但是想了想这道题在STL这一章应该用不到Hash，就写出了如下的暴力代码。

结果:时间超限14%

#include <iostream>
#include <cstring>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
const int maxn = 2550;
const int maxs = 40005;
using namespace std;
int main(){
    int n,k;
    cin>>n>>k;
    vector<string> v[maxn];
    vector<int > na;
    for (int j = 1; j <= k; ++j) {
        string name;
        int index,nums;
        cin>>index>>nums;
        for (int i = 1; i <= nums; ++i) {
            cin>>name;
            v[index].push_back(name);
        }
    }
    string q;
    while(cin>>q){
        cout<<q<<" ";
        for (int i = 1; i <= k; ++i) {
            for (auto it = v[i].begin(); it != v[i].end(); it++) {
                if(*it == q){
                    na.push_back(i);
                }
            }
        }
        cout<<na.size()<<" ";
        for(auto it2 = na.begin(); it2 != na.end(); it2++){

            cout<<*(it2)<<" ";
        }
        cout<<endl;
        na.clear();
    }
    return 0;
}

题解：

以下是Hash+vector的AC代码

AC

需要注意！输出容器内课程编号应排序为升序，原题**and finally the indices of the courses in increasing order.** 否则会“答案错误57%”

#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxn = 26 * 26 * 26 * 10 + 10;
int hashTable(char s[]){		
//满足最后一位是数字，可以直接用《算法笔记》中的Hash模版
    int id = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < strlen(s) - 1; ++i) {
        id = id * 26 + (s[i] - 'A');
    }
    id = id * 10 + (s[strlen(s) - 1] - '0');
    return id;
}
int main(){
    int n,k;
    char name[5];
    scanf("%d%d",&n,&k);	//scanf尽可能替换cin
    vector<int > v[maxn];
    for (int i = 1; i <= k; ++i) {
        int c,c_nums;
        scanf("%d%d" ,&c ,&c_nums);
        for (int j = 1; j <= c_nums; ++j) {
            scanf("%s",name);
            v[hashTable(name)].push_back(c);
        }
    }
    while(scanf("%s",name)!=EOF){
        printf("%s ",name);           //printf尽可能替换cout
        printf("%d ",v[hashTable(name)].size());
        sort(v[hashTable(name)].begin(),v[hashTable(name)].end());   
        //样例输出为升序，如果不加sort会“答案错误57%”
        for (vector<int>::iterator it = v[hashTable(name)].begin();
        it != v[hashTable(name)].end();it++) {
            cout<<*it<<" ";
        }
        cout<<endl;
    }
    return 0;
}

明天就回家避暑去了，应该会继续刷题的吧🌚

entry.title: 题解Codeup6117:Student List for Course (25)
entry.content:
题目

http://codeup.cn/problem.php?cid=100000596&pid=1

这个专题的做题顺序应该是6117->6114......第一个直接暴力会超时，需要字符串Hash一下，6117具体的做法下回分解。

思路：

建立一个vector<string>型的数组v[course]，course是这门课的编号，数组里装选这门课的所有学生名字。然后根据题目要求输出课编号，选课人数即为v[i].size()，遍历输出每个名字。

坑点：Then output the students' names in alphabetical order. 输出的名字按字典序排列。没注意到这个你就会WA。

题解：

#include <iostream>
#include <cstring>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
const int maxn = 2550;
using namespace std;
int main(){
    int n,k;
    cin>>n>>k;
    string name;
    vector<string> v[maxn];
    while(n--){
        int c,course;
        cin>>name;
        cin>>c;
        for (int i = 1; i <= c; ++i) {
            cin>>course;
            v[course].push_back(name);
        }
    }
    for (int j = 1; j <= k; ++j) {
        cout<<j<<" ";
        cout<<v[j].size()<<endl;
        sort(v[j].begin(),v[j].end());     //字典序排列容器中的名字字符串
        for (vector<string>::iterator it = v[j].begin();it != v[j].end(); it++) {
            cout<<*it<<endl;
        }
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 题解PAT B1013:数素数
entry.content:
题目：

https://pintia.cn/problem-sets/994805260223102976/problems/994805309963354112

思路:

素数筛法 + 打表：用筛法（筛法的详细讲解见胡凡《算法笔记》P162）求出范围内第1-第10^4个素数，根据要求输出。

如何知道第10^4个素数大约是多少？需要先调整定义过的maxn的范围，输出FindPrime()的cnt值来获得。经测试maxn==100000筛出9593个素数，maxn==150000筛出13849个素数，所以maxn选择150000即可。

题解:

#include <iostream>
using namespace std;
const int maxn = 200500;        //要大于第10^4个素数的范围
int prime[maxn] = {0};
int cnt = 1;
void FindPrime(){           //素数筛
    bool a[maxn] = {false};
    for (int i = 2; i < maxn; ++i) {
        if (a[i] == false){
            for (int j = i + i ; j < maxn ; j = j + i) {
                a[j] = true;
            }
            prime[cnt] = i;
            cnt++;
        }
    }
}
int main(){
    int ans = 1;
    int s,d;
    cin>>s>>d;
    FindPrime();
    for (int i = s; i <= d; ++i,ans++) {
        if (ans % 10 == 0){	//每10个数一换行+去掉空格
            cout<<prime[i];
            cout<<endl;
        }else if(i != d ){
            cout<<prime[i]<<" ";
        }else if(i == d ){	//最后一个输出结果也不能有空格
            cout<<prime[i];
        }
    }
    return 0;
}

What I learned（遇到的坑）

1.maxn一开始开的太小了，有几个测试点WA了
2.输出格式要注意，最后一个输出结果后面也不能带有空格，否则就会Presentation Error

entry.title: 题解洛谷P3370:【模板】字符串哈希
entry.content:
正题之前先看一下乞丐版的字符串Hash：

问题：
给出N个字符串（由恰好三位大写字母组成），再给出M个查询字符串，问每个查询字符串在N个字符串中出现的次数？

思路就是将字符串每一位看成26进制数的每一位（因为题目只有大写，如果有小写的话就是52进制，以此类推，包含所有ASCII码的字符串就是127进制），然后进行换算得出唯一的Hash值

题解

#include <iostream>
#include <cstring>
using namespace std;
int hashFunc(char s[],int len){
    int id = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < len; ++i) {
        id = id * 26 + (s[i] - 'A');
    }
    return id;
}
int main(){
    int n,m;
    cin>>n;
    char s[10];
    int hashTable[26 * 26 * 26 + 10];
    memset(hashTable,0,sizeof(hashTable));
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        scanf("%s",s);
        hashTable[hashFunc(s,3)] ++;
    }
    cin>>m;
    int t;
    while(m--){
        scanf("%s",s);
        t = hashTable[hashFunc(s,3)];
        cout<<t<<endl;
    }
    return 0;
}

正题题目：

https://www.luogu.org/problemnew/show/P3370

题如其名模版题，按规矩办事即可

90分代码

第二个点一直没过，看了讨论区也没有解决....可能是卡了大素数

#include <iostream>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstdio>
#define b 131
#define mod 19260817
using namespace std;
long long hashFunc(char s[],int len){
    int id = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < len; ++i) {
        if (s[i] > 'A' && s[i] < 'Z'){
            id = (id * b + (s[i] - 'A')) % mod;
        }else if(s[i] > 'a' && s[i] < 'z'){
            id = (id * b + (s[i] - 'a') + 26) % mod;
        }else if (s[i] > '0' && s[i] < '9'){
            id = (id * b + (s[i] - '0') + 52) % mod;
        }
    }
    return id;
}
int main(){
    int n,cnt = 1;
    char s[10500];
    long long hashTable[10500] ;
    memset(hashTable, false, sizeof(hashTable));
    cin>>n;
    getchar();
    getchar();
    for (int i = 0; i < n ; ++i) {
        scanf("%s",s);
        hashTable[i] = hashFunc(s,strlen(s)) ;
    }
    sort(hashTable ,hashTable + n);
    for (int j = 1; j < n; ++j) {
        if(hashTable[j] != hashTable[j - 1]){
            cnt++;
        }
    }
    cout<<cnt<<endl;
    return 0;
}

AC

思路：unsigned long long类型具有自动溢出取模功能，如果unsigned long long溢出会自动模2^64，这样就不需要我们寻找大素数取模了。（好吧我承认我也是看题解区才知道的...）

#include <iostream>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdio>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
typedef unsigned long long ull;//宏定义
#define b 131
ull hashFunc(char s[], int len){
    ull id = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < len; ++i) {
        id = id * b + (ull)s[i];
    }
    return id;
}
int main(){
    char s[10500];
    ull hashTable[10050];
    memset(hashTable,0, sizeof(hashTable));
    int n,cnt = 1;
    cin>>n;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        scanf("%s",s);
        hashTable[i] = hashFunc(s,strlen(s));
    }
    sort(hashTable,hashTable + n);
    for (int j = 1; j < n; ++j) {
        if (hashTable[j] != hashTable[j - 1]){
            cnt++;
        }
    }
    cout<<cnt<<endl;
    return 0;
}

过了这道题，那下面这道题就是洒洒水啦

Codeup6120:String Subtraction

http://codeup.cn/problem.php?cid=100000582&pid=3

#include <iostream>
#include <cstring>
using namespace std;
int main(){
    int hashTable[130];
    memset(hashTable, 0, sizeof(hashTable));
    char a[10010],b[10010];
    gets(a);
    //cin.get(a, sizeof(a));
    gets(b);
    for (int i = 0; i < strlen(b); ++i) {
        hashTable[(int)b[i]] = 1;
    }
    for (int j = 0; j < strlen(a); ++j) {
        if (hashTable[(int)a[j]] == 0){
            cout<<a[j];
        }
    }
    return 0;
}

这道题的唯一一个坑点就是第二行输入也就是b串也是可能含空格的，所以不能用scanf("%s",b)也需要用gets(b)不然会WA。
